title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Narayana Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Narayana Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Curriculum Developer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!
